title: agalinis linarioides
intro: Agalinis linarioides, also known as Flishing or Purple False Foxglove, is a perennial plant species in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agalinis linarioides include relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. Agalinis linarioides can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, with some herbalists also using it in salves and poultices to treat skin issues.
